// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated by Mutty.

#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Immutable;
using System.Linq;

namespace Mutty.Tests
{
    /// <summary>
    /// The mutable wrapper for the <see cref="Repository"/> record.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class MutableRepository
    {
        private Repository _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutableRepository"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutableRepository(Repository record)
        {
            _record = record;

            Entity = _record.Entity;
            Id = _record.Id;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="Repository"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public Repository Build()
        {
            return _record with
            {
                Entity = this.Entity,
                Id = this.Id,
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="Repository"/> to <see cref="MutableRepository"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutableRepository(Repository record)
        {
            return new MutableRepository(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="MutableRepository"/> to <see cref="Repository"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator Repository(MutableRepository mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Entity.
        /// </summary>
        public T Entity { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Id.
        /// </summary>
        public int Id { get; set; }
    }
}
